name: Heringsalat (Herring Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil and 1 tablespoon of vinegar to the mixture.
3. Stir well to combine.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve on tightly cupped lettuce leaves.
